name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Standard Terms
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) terms, created by a committee of attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, and law firms.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement — Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Incorporates the Standard Terms by reference and holds the negotiated, party-specific details.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for licensing cloud-hosted software.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime, support, and performance commitments.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) governing the processing of personal data between parties.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage collaboration between a vendor and a design partner customer.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) for the delivery of professional services.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement governing a business partnership between two companies.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-covered entities and their business associates.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing on-premises or self-hosted software.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for running a time-boxed trial of a product or service before a full commercial engagement.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum covering the use of artificial intelligence and machine learning within a broader agreement.
